nasb.text: I will lay waste your cities as well and will make your sanctuaries desolate, and I will not smell your soothing aromas.

esv.text: And I will lay your cities waste and will make your sanctuaries desolate, and I will not smell your pleasing aromas.

cnv.text: 我必使你們的城市變為荒場，使你們的聖所荒涼；我也不聞你們馨香的祭。

ccb.text: 我要使你们的城邑沦为废墟，使你们的敬拜场所荒凉，也不再悦纳你们的馨香之祭。
